ledbp_init.tooltip: Initialize an Adafruit LED Backpack (HT16K33 based) via I2C (default address 0x70)

ledbp_write_display.tooltip: Write buffer data to the display to apply changes

ledbp_clear.tooltip: Clear the display buffer (call refresh to apply)

ledbp_set_display_state.tooltip: Turn the display on or off

ledbp_seven_print_number.tooltip: Print a number (integer or float) on the 4-digit 7-segment display and refresh

ledbp_seven_print_number_base.tooltip: Print an integer in the specified base

ledbp_seven_write_digit_num.tooltip: Write a single digit at position (0-4); position 2 is the colon

ledbp_seven_draw_colon.tooltip: Turn on or off the center colon of the 7-segment display

ledbp_alpha_write_digit_ascii.tooltip: Display an ASCII character at position (0-3) on the 14-segment display

ledbp_alpha_print_text.tooltip: Print up to 4 characters on the 14-segment alphanumeric display

ledbp_matrix_color.tooltip: Pick a color. Mono matrices use on/off; bi-color and bargraph support red/yellow/green

ledbp_matrix_draw_pixel.message0: matrix draw pixel X: %1 Y: %2 color %3
ledbp_matrix_draw_pixel.tooltip: Draw a pixel at the specified coordinates

ledbp_matrix_draw_line.message0: matrix draw line from X: %1 Y: %2 to X: %3 Y: %4 color %5
ledbp_matrix_draw_line.tooltip: Draw a straight line on the matrix

ledbp_matrix_draw_rect.message0: matrix draw rect X: %1 Y: %2 W: %3 H: %4 color %5

ledbp_matrix_fill_rect.message0: matrix fill rect X: %1 Y: %2 W: %3 H: %4 color %5

ledbp_matrix_draw_circle.message0: matrix draw circle X: %1 Y: %2 R: %3 color %4

ledbp_matrix_set_text_size.tooltip: Set the text size (1 is normal)

ledbp_matrix_set_cursor.tooltip: Set the starting position for text printing

ledbp_matrix_print.tooltip: Print text at the current cursor position

ledbp_matrix_set_text_wrap.tooltip: Enable or disable automatic text wrap (disable for scrolling)

ledbp_bar_set_bar.tooltip: Set the color of a single bar (0-23) on the 24-bar bargraph
